title: Pondicherry University Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Technical Support III Posts
description: Pondicherry University has declared the latest notification for the recruitment of Project Technical Support III Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in post-graduation can use this chance and apply for the Pondicherry University Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
